project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining Hacker's Keyboard power-user features with modern SwiftKey-inspired UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Session 4 Designed — Voice, Command Mode & Autocorrect
current_phase.details: Session 3 fully implemented. Session 4 design doc and 8-phase plan committed. Ready to run /implement.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded from GitHub repos

metadata.session_notes: Session 9: Confirmed Session 3 complete. Brainstormed Session 4 — pivoted from TF Lite prediction to dictionary-based (user preference). Whisper voice bundled in APK. Design doc + 8-phase plan committed.
